feedback.text: The EU needs to broaden it's digital consumer rights coverage including games: bigger game companies for example are using their influence to continue their bad practices with not enough guard rails to have questionable practices in check as they have shown their bad faith with the license and lootbox debacle that are directly harmful to consumers. The Digital Fairness Act has the chance to reshape the landscape for the better of the consumer, and there's no reason not to do it.
